title: Rise of Steps
message: Stair rise {value}mm is outside the permitted {min}-{max}mm range (NBC §9.8.4.1, Table 9.8.4.1). Public stairs are further limited to a 180mm maximum.

title: Run of Steps
message: Stair run {value}mm is below the {min}mm minimum for private stairs (NBC §9.8.4.2, Table 9.8.4.2). Public stairs require at least 280mm.

title: Minimum Width of Stairs
message: Stair width {value}mm is below the {min}mm minimum (NBC §9.8.2.1). Required exit/public stairs serving non-residential occupancies require more.

title: Stair Headroom
message: Stair headroom {value}mm is below the {min}mm minimum (NBC §9.8.2.2); headroom must be at least 1950mm plus the height of one riser.

title: Doorway Width
message: Door width {value}mm is below the {min}mm minimum for required/barrier-free doorways (NBC §9.5.3). Verify the doorway's role before actioning.

title: Width of Corridors
message: Corridor width {value}mm is below the {min}mm minimum for a public, public-use or exit corridor (NBC §9.9.3.3). In-suite corridors are exempt.

title: Room Ceiling Heights
message: Ceiling height {value}mm is below the {min}mm absolute minimum (NBC §9.5.3.1, Table 9.5.3.1). Most habitable rooms require 2100mm over the required area.

title: Height of Guards
message: Guard height {value}mm is below the {min}mm minimum (NBC §9.8.8.3). Guards other than within a dwelling unit must be at least 1070mm high.

title: Exit Width
message: Exit facility width {value}mm is below the {min}mm minimum (NBC §9.9.3.2).
